profile: Full Stack Developer with over 6 years of experience building end-to-end web applications for SaaS, B2B, and AI-driven products. Delivered 12+ production applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, and cloud services across multiple markets. Integrated third-party AI and communication APIs (OpenAI, ElevenLabs, Twilio, Deepgram) into cohesive product experiences with reliable uptime. Built real-time features using WebSockets and streaming architectures for live collaboration and communication platforms. Improved feature delivery cycles by 30% through reusable full-stack templates, CI/CD automation, and infrastructure-as-code practices on AWS.

projects.name: JustBeMe.ai – AI Business Assistant
projects.description: AI assistant automating inbound/outbound communications across calls, WhatsApp, SMS, and email, with knowledge base answers and real-time appointment booking.
features: Built end-to-end communication workflows integrating Meta WhatsApp API, Twilio voice/SMS, and email services
Developed the real-time appointment booking system with Google Calendar integration and conflict resolution
Implemented the knowledge base ingestion and retrieval system for AI-powered customer responses
Built admin dashboard for managing communication channels, AI behavior, and analytics across client variants

projects.name: Talky Walky – AI English Practice
projects.description: Language-learning platform where students practice English with an AI tutor, while teachers can review transcripts, add feedback, or join conversations.
features: Developed the full-stack conversation interface with real-time AI tutor interactions and speech processing
Built the teacher dashboard for reviewing student transcripts, adding feedback, and monitoring progress
Implemented WebSocket-based real-time features for live teacher-student conversation joining
Designed the assessment engine for tracking student proficiency levels and generating progress reports

projects.name: Sports Commentary – Real-Time Multilingual Commentary
projects.description: Live sports commentary system that transcribes, translates, and streams audio in multiple languages in real time.
features: Built the full-stack real-time streaming architecture for live audio transcription and translation
Integrated Deepgram for speech-to-text and ElevenLabs for multi-language voice synthesis
Developed the frontend commentary player with language switching and live synchronization
Implemented low-latency WebSocket pipelines for real-time audio streaming across multiple channels
